en.text: a primitive root; also as denominative from H7272 to walk along; but only in specifically, applications, to reconnoiter, to be atale-bearer (i.e. slander); to lead about

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; also as denominative from H7272 to walk along; but only in specifically, applications, to reconnoiter, to be atale-bearer (i.e. slander); to lead about
